column8: COM Release helper for DDraw FMV surfaces; listed in FMV stub manifest as ARCH-DIVERGENCE-FMV. Port replaces EA TGQ/DDraw stack with IMFSourceReader; no 1:1 mapping.
DirectSound stream-buffer init for FMV audio (CreateSoundBuffer/SetFormat/Play). Port routes FMV audio through WMF pipeline; entire EA TGQ stack stubbed.
COM Release of DSStreamBuffer at param_1[0x5c]; FMV audio teardown. Replaced wholesale by IMFSourceReader release pipeline.
EA IMA-ADPCM nibble decode loop with g_eaAdpcmCoefTable/g_eaAdpcmShiftTable (clamps -0x8000..0x7fff, step 0..0x1600). EA TGQ codec - stubbed.
Dual-channel EA-ADPCM decoder using g_eaAdpcmDecoderState globals (predA/predB/predC/stepIndex). EA TGQ codec; replaced by WMF pipeline.
